diffCoverage.notes: The bug-relevant change is a single call-site flip in command/login_and_listen from zalo::login to zalo::login_with(.., true). Other diff in command/mod.rs (SessionManager + identity backfill) belongs to separate in-flight features and is out of this task's scope.

findings.evidence: The change lives entirely in the command layer and calls the pre-existing zalo-layer API login_with(credentials, true). That is a forward dependency (zalo precedes command in types->config->store->zalo->session->command), so no layer boundary moved. login_with already existed and is used by live tests (zalo/mod.rs, session/mod.rs), so no new public API surface was introduced. All four production session-start commands funnel through login_and_listen, so the single flip covers every listener path with no bypass.

summary: Architecture review: enabling self_listen is a one-line call-site change in the command layer against the existing zalo::login_with API. No layer-boundary change, no new public API, no ADR trigger. login_and_listen is the single shared production listen path, so the fix is complete and non-duplicated. Approve.
